analysisGoal: 综合产品改进分析（示例数据）

rawReviews.title: Subscription too expensive
rawReviews.content: The workout plans are great but the subscription is way too expensive compared to other fitness apps. I can't justify $9.99/month when there are similar apps for $4.99.
rawReviews.author: FitnessFan22

rawReviews.title: App crashes during workouts
rawReviews.content: Every time I start a workout video, the app crashes after about 5 minutes. This is so frustrating, I've lost my workout progress multiple times. iPhone 14, iOS 17.4.
rawReviews.author: YogaLover99

rawReviews.title: Great variety of workouts
rawReviews.content: I really like the variety of workout plans available. The trainers are motivating and the video quality is excellent. Would give 5 stars if there were more beginner-friendly options.
rawReviews.author: NewToFitness

rawReviews.title: Can't cancel subscription
rawReviews.content: I've been trying to cancel my subscription for 2 weeks. The cancel button in settings doesn't work, and customer support hasn't responded to my emails. This feels like a scam.
rawReviews.author: AngryUser123

rawReviews.title: Good but needs offline mode
rawReviews.content: The workouts are effective and I've seen results in 2 weeks. However, I often exercise in places with poor internet and the app is unusable without a connection. Please add offline downloads!
rawReviews.author: TravelFit

rawReviews.title: Audio out of sync with video
rawReviews.content: In several workouts the trainer's audio is 2-3 seconds behind the video. It makes it really hard to follow along. This happens on both WiFi and cellular data.
rawReviews.author: TechRunner

rawReviews.title: Perfect for home workouts
rawReviews.content: As a busy mom, this app is perfect. I can do 15-minute workouts while the baby naps. The home gym equipment needed is minimal. Love the weekly challenges!
rawReviews.author: BusyMomLife

rawReviews.title: Charged twice for subscription
rawReviews.content: I was charged twice for the annual subscription ($79.99 x 2). Customer support is non-existent. I've disputed the charge with Apple. DO NOT SUBSCRIBE until they fix their billing.
rawReviews.author: DoubleCharged

rawReviews.title: Needs more customization
rawReviews.content: The preset workout plans are fine but I wish I could create custom workouts or at least swap out exercises I don't like. Sometimes the recommended weights are way off for my fitness level.
rawReviews.author: CustomFitness

rawReviews.title: Calorie tracking integration needed
rawReviews.content: I track my calories in MyFitnessPal and wish this app would sync workout data there. Having to manually log everything is tedious. Otherwise great app with solid workouts.
rawReviews.author: DataDrivenFit

rawReviews.title: Workout timer freezes
rawReviews.content: The rest timer between sets keeps freezing. I'll think 30 seconds have passed and it's actually been 3 minutes. Makes interval training impossible. This bug has been there for months.
rawReviews.author: IntervalKing

rawReviews.title: Misleading free trial
rawReviews.content: The app says '7-day free trial' but it charged me immediately. When I tried to get a refund, I was told it was in the terms. Very misleading marketing. The workouts themselves are decent.
rawReviews.author: TrialTrap

rawReviews.title: Great results in 30 days
rawReviews.content: I've been using this app for 30 days and I can already see real results. The progressive overload system works well. The meal plan suggestions are a nice bonus too.
rawReviews.author: ResultsDriven

rawReviews.title: Needs better Apple Watch support
rawReviews.content: The Apple Watch app is basically useless. It only shows heart rate but doesn't track reps, sets, or rest time. I end up having to use my phone anyway, which defeats the purpose.
rawReviews.author: WatchUser

rawReviews.title: Video quality drops randomly
rawReviews.content: On a 100Mbps connection, the video quality still drops to what looks like 240p sometimes. Other streaming apps work fine. Seems like a CDN or encoding issue on their end.
rawReviews.author: QualityMatters

rawReviews.title: Cannot log in after update
rawReviews.content: After updating to 3.2.2 I can't log in anymore. It says 'authentication failed' even though my password is correct. Reset password link doesn't send any email. Was working fine before the update.
rawReviews.author: LockedOutUser

rawReviews.title: Social challenges keep me motivated
rawReviews.content: The weekly challenges with friends are the best feature. Seeing my friends' progress pushes me to not skip workouts. The leaderboard is addictive in the best way. Keep adding more challenge types!
rawReviews.author: SocialFitnessPro

rawReviews.title: No onboarding for beginners
rawReviews.content: First time opening the app and I was dumped straight into advanced workouts with no guidance. As a complete beginner I had no idea what to do. Needs a proper onboarding flow that asks about fitness level and goals.
rawReviews.author: LostBeginner

rawReviews.title: Search is terrible
rawReviews.content: Searching for 'yoga' returns random HIIT workouts. The search filters don't work — I filter by 'no equipment' and still get workouts that need dumbbells. How hard is it to make search actually filter results?
rawReviews.author: FrustratedSearcher

rawReviews.title: Too many notifications
rawReviews.content: I get 3-4 push notifications per day reminding me to work out. It's annoying and makes me want to turn them all off, but then I'd miss the challenge invites. Let me choose what notifications I receive instead of all-or-nothing.
rawReviews.author: NotificationOverload

rawReviews.title: Please add data export
rawReviews.content: I want to export my workout history to a CSV so I can analyze my progress in my own spreadsheet. There's no way to do this in the app. I've asked support twice and got no response. Please add a data export feature.
rawReviews.author: DataGeek

rawReviews.title: 整体不错但订阅太贵
rawReviews.content: 用了三个月，训练计划很专业，视频质量也不错。但是订阅价格比同类应用贵了不少，月费 ¥68 有点难以接受，希望能推出更便宜的入门套餐或者年费优惠。
rawReviews.author: 健身爱好者

rawReviews.title: La aplicación se cierra sola
rawReviews.content: Cada vez que intento ver un video de entrenamiento la aplicación se cierra después de unos minutos. He perdido mi progreso varias veces. Tengo un iPhone 13 con iOS 17.2. Por favor arreglen esto.
rawReviews.author: UsuarioFrustrado

rawReviews.title: Meditation feature is a game changer
rawReviews.content: The new meditation sessions added in 3.3.0 are fantastic. 10-minute guided sessions before bed have completely changed my sleep quality. Love that it's included in the subscription, not a separate purchase.
rawReviews.author: MindfulAthlete

rawReviews.title: Recovery workouts are excellent
rawReviews.content: After an injury I used the recovery and mobility workouts to ease back in. The instructor clearly explains modifications for each movement. Would love more post-injury specific programs though.
rawReviews.author: ComebackTrail

rawReviews.title: Crashes mid workout
rawReviews.content: Every time I start a workout video, the app crashes after about 5 minutes. This is so frustrating, I've lost my workout progress multiple times. iPhone 14, iOS 17.4.
rawReviews.author: AnotherYogi

rawReviews.title: Sleep tracking is inaccurate
rawReviews.content: The new sleep tracking in 3.3.0 says I only slept 4 hours when my Apple Health says 7.5 hours. It keeps logging me as awake whenever I move. The feature feels half-baked and rushed out.
rawReviews.author: SleepSkeptic

rawReviews.title: Wish I could share workouts
rawReviews.content: There's no way to share a workout with a friend who doesn't have the app. I want to send my favorite routine to my workout buddy but the only option is a generic 'invite' link. Add a proper share feature with workout preview.
rawReviews.author: ShareableFitness

rawReviews.title: App is slow to load
rawReviews.content: Takes 15-20 seconds to load the workout library every time I open the app. My internet is fine, other apps load instantly. Seems like the app re-downloads everything instead of caching. Makes me not want to open it.
rawReviews.author: ImpatientUser

rawReviews.title: Customer support never responds
rawReviews.content: I've emailed support three times about a billing error over the past month. Not a single response. The in-app help link just opens a useless FAQ page. Worst customer service I've experienced from any app.
rawReviews.author: IgnoredCustomer

rawReviews.title: Need family sharing plan
rawReviews.content: My partner and I both want to use this app but paying for two subscriptions is too expensive. Please add a family plan option — I'd happily pay 50% more for two accounts. Other apps have this, why not this one?
rawReviews.author: FamilyFitDuo

rawReviews.title: Not enough women-specific programs
rawReviews.content: Most programs seem designed for men. There are a few 'women's' workouts but they're mostly just lighter weights. Would love programs designed around menstrual cycle phases, pregnancy, and postpartum. Huge underserved market.
rawReviews.author: StrongWomanFit

rawReviews.title: Videos take up too much storage
rawReviews.content: The app is using 4.5GB on my phone after a month of use. There's no option to set a cache size limit or auto-clean old videos. Had to delete the app and reinstall to reclaim space. Add storage management!
rawReviews.author: StorageStruggle

rawReviews.title: Workout history sync broken
rawReviews.content: My workout history only shows the last 7 days on my iPad, but on my iPhone I can see everything. Cross-device sync is completely broken. I've tried logging out and back in, didn't help. Lost weeks of progress data.
rawReviews.author: SyncSufferer

rawReviews.title: Beautiful interface and smooth UX
rawReviews.content: The redesign in the latest version is gorgeous. Smooth animations, intuitive navigation, and the new dark mode is perfect for early morning workouts. This is what a premium fitness app should look like.
rawReviews.author: DesignLover

There's no way to share a workout with a friend who doesn't have the app. I want to send my favorite routine to my worko
Takes 15-20 seconds to load the workout library every time I open the app. My internet is fine, other apps load instantl
I've emailed support three times about a billing error over the past month. Not a single response. The in-app help link
My partner and I both want to use this app but paying for two subscriptions is too expensive. Please add a family plan o
Most programs seem designed for men. There are a few 'women's' workouts but they're mostly just lighter weights. Would l
The app is using 4.5GB on my phone after a month of use. There's no option to set a cache size limit or auto-clean old v
My workout history only shows the last 7 days on my iPad, but on my iPhone I can see everything. Cross-device sync is co
The redesign in the latest version is gorgeous. Smooth animations, intuitive navigation, and the new dark mode is perfec

findings.title: 订阅管理与扣费问题严重
findings.description: 多位用户反映无法取消订阅、被重复扣费、免费试用被立即收费，且客服未响应。这属于核心信任问题，直接影响用户留存和品牌口碑。涉及取消按钮失效、重复扣款、误导性试用条款三类子问题。
supportingExcerpts: I've been trying to cancel my subscription for 2 weeks. The cancel button in settings doesn't work
I was charged twice for the annual subscription ($79.99 x 2). Customer support is non-existent.
The app says '7-day free trial' but it charged me immediately.
I've emailed support three times about a billing error over the past month. Not a single response.

findings.title: 应用崩溃导致训练进度丢失
findings.description: 多个版本（3.2.0、3.2.1）中，用户在进行训练视频时应用崩溃，训练进度丢失。有用户反馈崩溃发生在视频开始约 5 分钟后。此问题严重影响核心功能可用性。
supportingExcerpts: Every time I start a workout video, the app crashes after about 5 minutes.
Cada vez que intento ver un video de entrenamiento la aplicación se cierra después de unos minutos.

findings.title: 更新后无法登录
findings.description: 3.2.2 版本更新后部分用户无法登录，提示 'authentication failed'，且密码重置邮件未发送。这是回归性 Bug，阻断核心流程。
supportingExcerpts: After updating to 3.2.2 I can't log in anymore. It says 'authentication failed' even though my password is correct.
findings.uncertaintyNotes: 仅 1 条评论报告，但问题严重（完全无法登录），且明确指向 3.2.2 版本回归。

findings.title: 视频与音频质量问题
findings.description: 用户反映音频与视频不同步（延迟 2-3 秒），以及视频质量在高速网络下随机降至 240p。影响训练跟练体验。
supportingExcerpts: the trainer's audio is 2-3 seconds behind the video. It makes it really hard to follow along.
On a 100Mbps connection, the video quality still drops to what looks like 240p sometimes.

findings.title: 缺少离线模式
findings.description: 网络不佳时应用不可用，用户强烈需求离线下载功能。这是高频功能请求，影响在健身房、户外等弱网环境的使用。
supportingExcerpts: I often exercise in places with poor internet and the app is unusable without a connection. Please add offline downloads!

findings.title: 训练计时器冻结
findings.description: 组间休息计时器冻结，导致用户误判休息时长，间歇训练无法进行。该 Bug 已存在数月未修复。
supportingExcerpts: The rest timer between sets keeps freezing. I'll think 30 seconds have passed and it's actually been 3 minutes.

findings.title: 新手引导缺失
findings.description: 新用户打开应用后直接进入高级训练，无引导流程询问健身水平和目标。对完全新手不友好，影响首次体验和转化。
supportingExcerpts: First time opening the app and I was dumped straight into advanced workouts with no guidance.

findings.title: 搜索与筛选功能失效
findings.description: 搜索 'yoga' 返回 HIIT 训练，'no equipment' 筛选仍返回需要哑铃的训练。搜索过滤完全不生效，严重影响内容发现。
supportingExcerpts: Searching for 'yoga' returns random HIIT workouts. The search filters don't work — I filter by 'no equipment' and still get workouts that need dumbbells.

findings.title: 订阅价格偏高
findings.description: 用户反映月费 $9.99 高于同类应用（$4.99），中文用户也反映 ¥68/月 难以接受。建议推出更便宜的入门套餐或年费优惠。
supportingExcerpts: the subscription is way too expensive compared to other fitness apps. I can't justify $9.99/month when there are similar apps for $4.99.
月费 ¥68 有点难以接受，希望能推出更便宜的入门套餐或者年费优惠。

findings.title: 跨设备同步失败
findings.description: iPad 上只能看到最近 7 天的训练历史，iPhone 上数据完整。跨设备同步完全失效，重新登录也无法解决。导致用户丢失数周进度数据。
supportingExcerpts: My workout history only shows the last 7 days on my iPad, but on my iPhone I can see everything. Cross-device sync is completely broken.

findings.title: Overall Rating Analysis
findings.description: Average rating: 2.7/5. 17/34 reviews (50%) are 1-2 stars. 10 reviews are 4-5 stars.
supportingExcerpts: The workout plans are great but the subscription is way too expensive compared to other fitness apps. I can't justify $9.99/month when there are similar apps for $4.99.
Every time I start a workout video, the app crashes after about 5 minutes. This is so frustrating, I've lost my workout progress multiple times. iPhone 14, iOS 17.4.
I've been trying to cancel my subscription for 2 weeks. The cancel button in settings doesn't work, and customer support hasn't responded to my emails. This feels like a scam.

findings.title: Data Limitations & Evidence Sufficiency
findings.description: 本次分析的数据局限性：样本量较小（仅 34 条有效评论），统计性结论可能不稳定；部分版本评论数过少（3.1.8 仅 1 条、3.1.9 仅 1 条），版本间对比结论需谨慎对待；样本平均评分 2.7 与 App Store 全量评分 4.2 偏差 1.5 分（样本偏低），采集到的评论可能不代表整体用户感受（全量 18534 条评分）。请在解读其他发现时将这些限制纳入考量。
findings.uncertaintyNotes: 样本量较小（仅 34 条评论）；部分版本评论数过少；样本评分 2.7 vs 全量 4.2（偏差 1.5，样本偏低）

requirements.title: 修复应用崩溃问题
requirements.description: 用户反馈在 3.2.0/3.2.1 版本中，开始训练视频约 5 分钟后应用崩溃，训练进度丢失。需要定位崩溃根因（内存泄漏/视频解码异常），并在下次发布前修复。用户反馈：'Every time I start a workout video, the app crashes after about 5 minutes.'
acceptance: 在 iPhone 14 / iOS 17.4 上连续播放训练视频 30 分钟不崩溃
崩溃率从当前水平降至 < 0.1%
崩溃后训练进度可恢复

requirements.title: 修复 3.2.2 版本登录回归
requirements.description: 3.2.2 版本更新后部分用户无法登录，提示 'authentication failed'，密码重置邮件未发送。需回滚或修复认证模块的回归。用户反馈：'After updating to 3.2.2 I can't log in anymore.'
acceptance: 3.2.2 用户使用正确密码可成功登录
密码重置邮件在 1 分钟内送达
认证失败时给出明确错误原因

requirements.title: 修复订阅管理与扣费问题
requirements.description: 用户无法取消订阅（取消按钮失效）、被重复扣费、免费试用被立即收费，且客服无响应。需修复取消流程、账单系统、试用逻辑。用户反馈：'I was charged twice for the annual subscription ($79.99 x 2).'
acceptance: 取消订阅按钮在设置页可正常点击并生效
重复扣费自动检测并退款
7 天试用期内不扣费
客服工单 48 小时内响应

requirements.title: 修复训练计时器冻结
requirements.description: 组间休息计时器冻结，导致间歇训练无法进行。该 Bug 已存在数月。用户反馈：'The rest timer between sets keeps freezing.'
acceptance: 连续 10 组间歇训练中计时器不冻结
计时器与系统时间同步，误差 < 1 秒
应用后台返回前台后计时器继续正确运行

requirements.title: 增加离线训练模式
requirements.description: 用户在弱网环境无法使用应用。需支持训练视频离线下载。用户反馈：'I often exercise in places with poor internet and the app is unusable without a connection.'
acceptance: 用户可下载训练视频至本地
离线模式下可完整完成训练并记录进度
下载管理支持选择画质和清理缓存

requirements.title: 优化订阅定价策略
requirements.description: 月费 $9.99 高于同类应用，用户反映难以接受。建议推出入门套餐或年费优惠。用户反馈：'I can't justify $9.99/month when there are similar apps for $4.99.'
acceptance: 提供至少 3 档订阅方案（入门/标准/高级）
年费方案相比月费优惠 >= 30%
新用户可享 7 天真实免费试用（不扣费）

requirements.title: 改善新手引导流程
requirements.description: 新用户无引导直接进入高级训练。需增加 onboarding 流程询问健身水平和目标。用户反馈：'First time opening the app and I was dumped straight into advanced workouts with no guidance.'
acceptance: 首次启动展示 3-5 步引导流程
根据用户健身水平推荐合适的入门训练
引导可跳过且可在设置中重新触发

requirements.title: 修复搜索与筛选功能
requirements.description: 搜索返回不相关结果，筛选条件不生效。需重构搜索索引和筛选逻辑。用户反馈：'Searching for yoga returns random HIIT workouts. The search filters don't work.'
acceptance: 搜索 'yoga' 仅返回瑜伽类训练
'no equipment' 筛选正确过滤出无需器械的训练
搜索结果在 500ms 内返回

versionPlan.theme: 关键修复——稳定性与信任
requirementTitles: 修复 3.2.2 版本登录回归
修复订阅管理与扣费问题
versionPlan.rationale: V1.0 聚焦阻断核心流程的严重 Bug 和直接影响用户信任的订阅扣费问题。崩溃和登录失败导致用户完全无法使用应用，订阅问题损害品牌信誉，必须在下一个版本立即修复。

versionPlan.theme: 高价值改进——离线与定价
versionPlan.rationale: V1.1 解决高频功能请求（离线模式）和转化障碍（定价偏高）。这两个改进直接影响用户留存和付费转化，优先级仅次于 V1.0 的关键修复。
V2.0 聚焦体验优化类需求。新手引导改善首次转化，搜索修复提升内容发现效率。这些是重要但非紧急的改进，排在关键修复和高价值功能之后。

executiveSummary: 基于 35 条用户评论（去重后 34 条）的分析，识别出 12 项产品发现，其中 3 项为严重级别（P0）：应用崩溃、登录回归、订阅扣费问题。建议分三个版本推进：V1.0（关键修复，4 项需求）、V1.1（离线模式与定价优化，2 项需求）、V2.0（体验优化，2 项需求）。负面评论占比约 50%，主要集中在订阅管理、稳定性和媒体播放三个领域。数据存在样本量较小的局限性（34 条），建议扩大样本后复核统计性结论。

testCases.title: 连续播放训练视频 30 分钟不崩溃
steps: Given 用户在 WiFi 网络下打开应用
When 用户开始一个 30 分钟的训练视频
Then 视频连续播放 30 分钟应用不崩溃
testCases.expectedResult: 训练视频完整播放，应用无崩溃，训练进度正常记录

testCases.title: 崩溃后训练进度可恢复
steps: Given 用户正在播放训练视频且已进行 10 分钟
When 应用因外部原因被系统杀死
Then 用户重新打开应用时可从第 10 分钟继续
testCases.expectedResult: 应用恢复后提示'继续上次训练'，进度从断点恢复

testCases.title: 3.2.2 用户使用正确密码可登录
steps: Given 用户已更新至 3.2.2 版本
When 用户输入正确的邮箱和密码点击登录
Then 登录成功进入主页
testCases.expectedResult: 登录成功，无 'authentication failed' 错误

testCases.title: 密码重置邮件及时送达
steps: Given 用户在登录页点击'忘记密码'
When 用户输入注册邮箱并提交
Then 1 分钟内收到密码重置邮件
testCases.expectedResult: 密码重置邮件在 60 秒内送达，链接可正常重置密码

testCases.title: 取消订阅按钮可正常点击并生效
steps: Given 用户已订阅并进入设置页
When 用户点击'取消订阅'按钮
Then 订阅在当前周期结束后取消
testCases.expectedResult: 取消按钮可点击，取消后状态更新且收到确认邮件

testCases.title: 重复扣费自动检测并退款
steps: Given 用户在短时间内被扣费两次
When 系统检测到同一周期的重复扣款
Then 第二笔扣款自动退款
testCases.expectedResult: 重复扣款在 24 小时内自动退款，用户收到通知

testCases.title: 连续间歇训练计时器不冻结
steps: Given 用户开始一个 10 组的间歇训练
When 用户完成所有 10 组训练
Then 每组休息计时器均正常倒计时
testCases.expectedResult: 10 组训练中计时器全程不冻结，倒计时准确

testCases.title: 应用后台返回后计时器继续
steps: Given 用户正在间歇训练中
When 用户切换到其他应用 10 秒后返回
Then 计时器显示正确剩余时间
testCases.expectedResult: 计时器与实际经过时间同步，不因后台切换而冻结

testCases.title: 下载训练视频至本地
steps: Given 用户在 WiFi 网络下
When 用户点击训练视频的下载按钮
Then 视频下载完成并标记为可离线播放
testCases.expectedResult: 视频下载成功，离线模式下可播放

testCases.title: 离线模式完整完成训练
steps: Given 用户已下载训练视频且处于离线状态
When 用户开始并完成训练
Then 训练进度记录并在联网后同步
testCases.expectedResult: 离线训练正常完成，进度本地记录，联网后自动同步

testCases.title: 多档订阅方案可选
steps: Given 用户进入订阅页
When 用户查看可选方案
Then 至少有入门/标准/高级 3 档方案
testCases.expectedResult: 展示 3 档方案，价格和功能差异清晰

testCases.title: 年费方案优惠达标
steps: Given 用户查看年费方案
When 对比月费 × 12 与年费价格
Then 年费优惠幅度 >= 30%
testCases.expectedResult: 年费相比月费累计至少优惠 30%

testCases.title: 首次启动展示引导流程
steps: Given 用户首次安装并打开应用
When 应用启动完成
Then 展示 3-5 步引导流程
testCases.expectedResult: 引导流程询问健身水平并推荐入门训练

testCases.title: 引导可跳过并重新触发
steps: Given 用户在引导流程中
When 用户点击'跳过'
Then 引导关闭且可在设置中重新打开
testCases.expectedResult: 引导可跳过，设置页有'重新查看引导'入口

testCases.title: 搜索 yoga 仅返回瑜伽训练
steps: Given 用户在搜索页
When 用户输入 'yoga' 并搜索
Then 结果仅包含瑜伽类训练
testCases.expectedResult: 搜索结果全部为瑜伽相关训练，无 HIIT 等无关结果

testCases.title: 无器械筛选正确过滤
steps: Given 用户在训练库页
When 用户勾选'无需器械'筛选
Then 结果中所有训练均不需要器械
testCases.expectedResult: 筛选结果不含需要哑铃/器械的训练
